title: Creamy Brazilian Tofu Skewers
description: A funky and gooey Brazilian dish featuring kanten-agar and miso-marinated tofu, perfect for a quick fix, and shojin-friendly. This recipe combines the flavors of Brazil with the simplicity of tofu skewers.

ingredients.name: extra firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into 1 inch cubes

instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together miso paste, kanten-agar, coconut milk, lime juice, and olive oil to make the marinade.
Add the tofu cubes to the marinade and toss to coat.
Thread the marinated tofu onto the bamboo skewers, leaving a small space between each cube.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the tofu is golden brown and the kanten-agar is caramelized.
While the skewers are grilling, mix the minced garlic with a little water to make a paste.
Brush the garlic paste onto the skewers during the last 2 minutes of grilling.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
